creator: olivierw1+bugzilla-freebsd@hotmail.com
text:
Well, I've more ports with the same problem, and it's seems related to libressl-devel, not libevent2.

I think this file: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/security/libressl-devel/version.mk?revision=416965&view=markup should contains:
OPENSSL_SHLIBVER?=	41
